placeholder.admin.pi_monitor_pre:
# 1) Edit script (if needed)
sudo nano /usr/local/bin/pi_monitor_test.sh

# 2) Make script executable (one time)
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/pi_monitor_test.sh

# 3) Start test (DEFAULT: 30 min, every 5 s, CSV is deleted beforehand)
sudo /usr/local/bin/pi_monitor_test.sh

# 4) Example: 15 min, every 15 s
sudo /usr/local/bin/pi_monitor_test.sh 15 15

# 5) Example: 30 min, every 10 s
sudo /usr/local/bin/pi_monitor_test.sh 10 30

# 6) View result (last 20 lines)
tail -n 20 /var/log/pi_monitor_test.csv

# 7) View explanation + summary
cat /var/log/pi_monitor_test_README.txt

# 8) Copy file to desktop/home (for easier download)
cp /var/log/pi_monitor_test.csv ~/
cp /var/log/pi_monitor_test_README.txt ~/

placeholder.confirm.uvc_install:
{% if uvc_backup_info.backup_exists %}Original backup for kernel {{ uvc_backup_info.kernel }} already exists and will NOT be overwritten.{% elif uvc_backup_info.marker_exists %}WARNING: No original backup for kernel {{ uvc_backup_info.kernel }} found, but an old UVC marker exists. Safe installation is therefore aborted until a backup has been copied to {{ uvc_backup_info.backup_dir }}.{% else %}Before installation, an original backup for kernel {{ uvc_backup_info.kernel }} will be written to {{ uvc_backup_info.backup_dir }}.{% endif %}

DO NOT INSTALL FOR THE FOLLOWING CAMERAS:
GXVISION IMX179

Install UVC hack now?
placeholder.confirm.uvc_uninstall:
{% if uvc_backup_info.backup_exists %}Original backup for kernel {{ uvc_backup_info.kernel }} is available. The UVC hack will be reverted exclusively from this local backup. The Mini PC will then restart automatically.{% else %}WARNING: No original backup available. Safe uninstallation via button is therefore NOT possible. The process aborts until a backup has been copied to {{ uvc_backup_info.backup_dir }}.{% endif %}

Uninstall UVC hack?

placeholder.themes.title: 5. Autodarts Themes
placeholder.themes.intro: Choose the look for https://play.autodarts.io/ here. Default means: theme off.
placeholder.themes.no_themes: No .css files were found in the theme folder yet.
placeholder.themes.install_hint: The extension automatically loads the active theme from the web panel and applies it to https://play.autodarts.io/.
placeholder.themes.info_body:
Note:
This theme feature only supports 16:9 resolutions.

Recommended resolutions:
1920 × 1080
1760 × 990
1600 × 900
1366 × 768
1280 × 720

If Autodarts makes major layout or CSS class changes, themes may need to be adjusted.

placeholder.tools.title: 6. Tools for Autodarts
placeholder.tools.description: This is an extension for Autodarts for animations, announcements and more.
placeholder.tools.activation_text: The extension must be activated on the device that is used for playing.
placeholder.tools.platform_text: iOS is not supported. On Android it currently works only with limitations and is not recommended.
placeholder.camera.focus_target_missing_text: The file was not found at: {path}
placeholder.cam_focus.lead_text: For precise focusing, align the Siemens star with the center crosshair and adjust focus slowly. The measurement area starts in the image center and can still be moved by clicking.
placeholder.cam_focus.click_hint_text: The measurement area starts on the center crosshair.
placeholder.cam_focus.step_1: Place the Siemens star or focus target as flat and centered as possible in front of the camera.
placeholder.cam_focus.step_2: Align the Siemens star as precisely as possible to the crosshair with center dot. You can move the measurement area by clicking if needed.
placeholder.cam_focus.step_3: Turn the focus slowly and look for the highest best value.
placeholder.cam_focus.step_4: If the value jumps, wait briefly until the image stabilizes.

placeholder.tools.platform_intro: The installation path depends on the device. Just choose the matching button — the recommended path for this device is highlighted below.
placeholder.tools.platform_text: Desktop Chromium-based browsers use the Chrome Web Store. Firefox also works through Mozilla Add-ons, including Firefox for Android. For iPhone and iPad there is an app in the App Store.
placeholder.tools.recommend_ios: Recommended for this device: Open the App Store and install “Tools for Autodarts” as an iPhone/iPad app.
placeholder.tools.recommend_android_fire: Recommended for this device: Install the Firefox add-on through Mozilla Add-ons.
placeholder.tools.recommend_android_othe: On Android, the direct Chrome Web Store route usually does not work. Best option: install Firefox and then open the Firefox add-on.
placeholder.tools.recommend_desktop_fire: Recommended for this device: Install the Firefox add-on through Mozilla Add-ons.
placeholder.tools.recommend_desktop_chro: Recommended for this device: Open the Chrome Web Store in your current desktop browser.
